steps.description: Dissolve 0.5 g of PVDF-HFP in acetone to make a 10 wt% solution at 40°C with magnetic stirring for 4 h.
Add 2.0 g of [C6C1im][NTf2] to the polymer solution with stirring.
Cast the solution into a petri dish.
Evaporate solvent at room temperature for 24 h.
Dry the sample at 60°C under vacuum for 12 h.

human_recipe.notes: The ionic liquid consists entirely of [C6C1im][NTf2] to achieve an average carbon number of 6.

evaluation.reasoning: The extraction is incorrect because it fails to detect the synthesis of new material.

steps.description: Dissolve 0.5 g of PVDF-HFP in acetone to make a 10 wt% solution at 40°C with magnetic stirring for 4 h.
Add 2.0 g of IL mixture to the polymer solution with stirring.
Cast the solution into a petri dish.
Evaporate solvent at room temperature for 24 h.
Dry the sample at 60°C under vacuum for 12 h.

human_recipe.notes: The IL mixture consists of a mixture of two ionic liquids [C(18)C1im][NTf(2)] and [C(6)C1im] [NTf2] in a molar ratio of 1:5.
